name: QCR HOLDINGS INC
business: QCR Holdings is a multi-bank holding company offering commercial and consumer banking, trust, and asset management services through four wholly-owned banking subsidiaries. It operates in the Quad Cities, Cedar Rapids, Waterloo/Cedar Falls, Des Moines/Ankeny, and Springfield markets. The company also provides equipment financing through its m2 subsidiary, although new loans and leases were discontinued in 2024.

exposures.sentence: Included in multi-family non-owner-occupied income-producing CRE is $1.9 billion of LIHTC loans which are financing for low-income housing tax credit real estate projects.

Competitors include not only other commercial banks, credit unions, thrift institutions, and mutual funds, but also insurance companies, financial technology, or fintech companies, digital asset service providers, finance companies, brokerage firms, investment banking companies, and a variety of other financial services and advisory companies.
